g.title: Entity Relationship Diagram created by erdantic

a.xlink:title:
document_processor.models.ImageAsset
Binary image asset stored once per document.

document_processor.models.PageInfo
Document page metadata used for approximate paged rendering.

document_processor.models.ParagraphIR
Structural paragraph unit used both at the document level and inside table cells.

document_processor.models.ImageIR
Image placement node inside paragraph-like content.

document_processor.models.NativeAnchor
Original native-document location for a stable DocIR node.

document_processor.models.TableIR
Nested table node under a paragraph.

document_processor.style_types.RunStyleInfo
Text-level formatting for a single run.
